# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Payment gateway API - Stripe"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Email service - SendGrid API"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "OAuth2 provider - Auth0"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "auth-service"
    - "api-gateway"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Google Maps API for geolocation services"
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
    - maps.google.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: cloud-storage
  annotations:
    description: "AWS S3 buckets for file storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "External PostgreSQL primary database - AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "External PostgreSQL read replica - AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
    - "search-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "External Redis cluster - AWS ElastiCache"
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 6380
      name: tcp-redis-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "MongoDB Atlas cluster for document storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.mongodb.net"
  addresses: []
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "content-service"
    - "catalog-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Elastic Cloud managed Elasticsearch"
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9243
      name: https-elastic
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
  annotations:
    description: "Confluent Cloud Kafka cluster"
spec:
  hosts:
    - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9093
      name: tcp-kafka-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-datadog
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: observability
  annotations:
    description: "Datadog monitoring and APM endpoints"
spec:
  hosts:
    - app.datadoghq.com
    - "*.datadoghq.com"
    - trace.agent.datadoghq.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
# VirtualService for Payment API with retry and timeout policies
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
  # HTTP routing for cases where TLS origination is handled at the gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-request-source:
              exact: payment-service
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,retriable-4xx
        retryRemoteLocalities: true
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
      fault: {}
    - timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
# VirtualService for Email API with rate limiting support
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /v3/mail/send
      timeout: 20s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 7s
        retryOn: 5xx,429,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
# VirtualService for Maps API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/geocode
      timeout: 5s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 2s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/directions
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 8s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
# VirtualService for PostgreSQL primary - write traffic
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
      # TCP keepalive to prevent connection drops
---
# VirtualService for PostgreSQL read replicas - read traffic routing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
    - "search-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for Redis cache
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "*"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6379
          weight: 100
    - match:
        - port: 6380
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6380
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for Elasticsearch
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /_bulk
          headers:
            x-request-source:
              exact: logging-service
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /_search
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 7s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
---
# VirtualService for Kafka cluster
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
spec:
  hosts:
    - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  exportTo:
    - "*"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 9092
      route:
        - destination:
            host: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
            port:
              number: 9092
          weight: 100
    - match:
        - port: 9093
      route:
        - destination:
            host: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
            port:
              number: 9093
          weight: 100
---
# DestinationRule for payment API - TLS origination and connection pool settings
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.stripe.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.stripe.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# DestinationRule for email API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.sendgrid.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 120s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# DestinationRule for PostgreSQL primary
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 15s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# DestinationRule for PostgreSQL read replica
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
    - "search-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 300
        connectTimeout: 15s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# DestinationRule for Redis cache
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "*"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 500
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 60s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 15s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30
---
# DestinationRule for Elasticsearch
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 600s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 20
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# DestinationRule for Maps API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: maps.googleapis.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 2
        idleTimeout: 120s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# DestinationRule for Kafka
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
spec:
  host: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  exportTo:
    - "*"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 5
---
# Sidecar configuration to restrict egress from specific namespaces
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-egress
  namespace: payment-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: payment-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.stripe.com"
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud"
        - "istio-system/*"
      port:
        number: 443
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
      port:
        number: 5432
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
      port:
        number: 6379
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-egress
  namespace: notification-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: notification-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.sendgrid.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: search-service-egress
  namespace: search-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: search-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io"
        - "istio-system/readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
# Egress Gateway for controlled external access
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: egress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-external-apis
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - api.stripe.com
        - api.sendgrid.com
        - maps.googleapis.com
        - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 5432
        name: tcp-postgres
        protocol: TCP
      hosts:
        - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
        - readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    - port:
        number: 6379
        name: tcp-redis
        protocol: TCP
      hosts:
        - redis-cluster.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
    - port:
        number: 9093
        name: tls-kafka
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
---
# VirtualService to route traffic through egress gateway for payment API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-gateway-payment
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - egress-gateway
  tls:
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - mesh
          port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-egressgateway.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - egress-gateway
          port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
# VirtualService to route database traffic through egress gateway
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-gateway-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - egress-gateway
  tcp:
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - mesh
          port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-egressgateway.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 5432
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - egress-gateway
          port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
